message: Update to 1.3.2 - Real Blender medical heart GLB as Bio-Synth primary asset.
releaseNotes: 1.3.2 - Blender 5.1 medical heart (.glb ~4MB + editable .blend): glass myocardium, chambers, valves, great vessels, coronaries, conduction. Bio-Synth prefers GLB over procedural bulk. Three.js runtime — not Unreal.
